EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} performed an SQL query on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} rebuilt database indexes on behalf of the user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user rebuilt database indexes on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} performed an SQL query on behalf of the user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user performed an SQL query on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} rebuilt database indexes on host {event_src.host}
